1.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that when they were forbidden from initiating conversation with the Prophet ﷺ, they hoped a reasonable Bedouin would come and ask him questions while they were present. A Bedouin came and knelt before the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: 'O Muhammad, your messenger came to us and claimed that you claim Allah has sent you.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'He spoke the truth.' The man said: 'By the One who raised the sky, spread the earth, and set the mountains firm — did Allah send you?' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Yes.' He said: 'Your messenger claimed you claim we must perform five prayers each day and night.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'He spoke the truth.' He said: 'By the One who sent you, did Allah command you with this?' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Yes.' He said: 'Your messenger claimed you claim we must fast one month each year.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'He spoke the truth.' He said: 'Did Allah command you with this?' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Yes.' He said: 'Your messenger claimed you claim we must pay zakah on our wealth.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'He spoke the truth.' He said: 'Did Allah command you with this?' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Yes.' He said: 'Your messenger claimed you claim we must perform Hajj to the House, for those who are able to do so.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'He spoke the truth.' He said: 'By the One who sent you, did Allah command you with this?' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Yes.' The man said: 'By the One who sent you with the truth, I will not leave any of them and will not exceed them.' The Prophet ﷺ then said: 'If the Bedouin is truthful, he will enter Paradise.'
1.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika mereka dilarang memulai percakapan dengan Nabi ﷺ, mereka berharap seorang Badui yang berakal datang dan bertanya kepada beliau. Seorang Badui datang dan berlutut di hadapan Rasulullah ﷺ seraya berkata: 'Wahai Muhammad, utusanmu datang kepada kami dan mengklaim bahwa engkau mengklaim Allah mengutusmu.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Dia benar.' Pria itu berkata: 'Demi Dzat yang mengangkat langit, membentangkan bumi, dan menegakkan gunung-gunung — apakah Allah mengutusmu?' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Ya.' Dia berkata: 'Utusanmu mengklaim bahwa kami harus shalat lima waktu sehari semalam.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Dia benar.' Dan seterusnya menanyakan tentang zakat, puasa, dan haji. Nabi ﷺ mengiyakan semuanya. Pria itu berkata: 'Demi Dzat yang mengutusmu dengan kebenaran, aku tidak akan meninggalkan satupun dan tidak akan melampauinya.' Nabi ﷺ kemudian bersabda: 'Jika si Badui itu jujur, dia akan masuk surga.'

2.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that a Bedouin came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'Peace be upon you, O young man of the Banu Abd al-Muttalib.' He replied: 'And upon you.' The man said: 'I am a man from your maternal relatives of Banu Sa'd ibn Bakr, and I am the messenger and delegate of my people to you. I will question you, so be thorough in your answers.' He then asked about the five pillars of Islam — the testimony of faith, the five daily prayers, fasting Ramadan, zakah, and Hajj — and the Prophet ﷺ confirmed each one. The man said: 'By the One who sent you with the truth, I will neither add to nor subtract from what you have told me.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'If he is truthful, he will enter Paradise.'
2.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa seorang Badui datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Assalamu'alaikum, wahai pemuda Bani Abdil Muthallib.' Beliau menjawab: 'Wa'alaikum salam.' Pria itu berkata bahwa ia adalah utusan kaumnya dari Bani Sa'd ibn Bakr. Ia menanyakan tentang syahadat, shalat lima waktu, puasa Ramadan, zakat, dan haji. Nabi ﷺ membenarkan semuanya. Pria itu berkata: 'Demi Dzat yang mengutusmu dengan kebenaran, aku tidak akan menambah atau mengurangi apa yang engkau sampaikan.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika dia jujur, dia akan masuk surga.'

3.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that the tribe of Banu Sa'd ibn Bakr sent Dimam ibn Tha'labah (may Allah be pleased with him) to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He came and tethered his camel at the door of the mosque, then tied it and entered. He asked the people about the Prophet ﷺ. When he came before the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, he said: 'By the One who raised the sky, spread the earth, and set the mountains, did Allah send you?' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Yes.' He then asked about the obligations of Islam one by one — prayer, fasting, zakah, and Hajj — and the Prophet ﷺ confirmed each. Dimam stood up and said: 'I bear witness that there is no god but Allah and that Muhammad is His servant and messenger. I will fulfill all of these obligations and avoid all that you have forbidden.' The Prophet ﷺ then said: 'If this man has spoken the truth, he will enter Paradise.'
3.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Bani Sa'd ibn Bakr mengutus Dhimam ibn Tsa'labah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) kepada Rasulullah ﷺ. Dia datang, menambatkan untanya di pintu masjid, masuk dan bertanya tentang Nabi ﷺ. Ketika berada di hadapan Rasulullah ﷺ, dia bertanya tentang kewajiban-kewajiban Islam satu per satu — shalat, puasa, zakat, dan haji — dan Nabi ﷺ membenarkan semuanya. Dhimam berdiri dan berkata: 'Aku bersaksi bahwa tidak ada tuhan selain Allah dan Muhammad adalah hamba dan utusan-Nya. Aku akan menunaikan semua kewajiban ini.' Nabi ﷺ kemudian bersabda: 'Jika orang ini jujur, dia akan masuk surga.'

4.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Purification is half of faith. Al-hamdulillah fills the scale. Subhanallah and Allahu Akbar fill what is between the heavens and the earth. Prayer is a light, charity is a proof, patience is a radiance, and the Quran is a proof for you or against you. Every person begins his day as a vendor of his soul, either freeing it or bringing about its ruin.'
4.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Asy'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Bersuci adalah setengah dari iman. Alhamdulillah memenuhi timbangan. Subhanallah dan Allahu Akbar memenuhi apa yang ada di antara langit dan bumi. Shalat adalah cahaya, sedekah adalah bukti, kesabaran adalah sinar, dan Al-Quran adalah hujjah bagimu atau atasmu. Setiap orang memulai harinya sebagai pedagang jiwanya sendiri, membebaskannya atau menghancurkannya.'

5.iwh_en: It was narrated from a man from Banu Sulaym who said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ counted them on my hand — or he counted them on his hand and his hand was in mine — saying: 'Subhanallah is half the scale, Alhamdulillah fills the scale, Allahu Akbar fills what is between the heavens and the earth, fasting is half of patience, and purification is half of faith.'
5.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang pria dari Bani Sulaym yang berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ menghitungnya di tanganku — atau menghitungnya di tangannya dan tangannya ada di tanganku — sambil bersabda: 'Subhanallah adalah setengah timbangan, Alhamdulillah memenuhi timbangan, Allahu Akbar memenuhi apa yang ada di antara langit dan bumi, puasa adalah setengah kesabaran, dan bersuci adalah setengah iman.'

6.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban, the freed servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Be steadfast and you will not be able to count it. Know that the best of your deeds is prayer.' One narrator added: 'Verily, among the best of your deeds is prayer.'
6.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bekas budak Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Istiqamahlah dan kalian tidak akan mampu menghitungnya. Ketahuilah bahwa sebaik-baik amal kalian adalah shalat.' Salah satu perawi menambahkan: 'Sesungguhnya, di antara sebaik-baik amal kalian adalah shalat.'

7.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Kabsha al-Saluli that Thawban, the servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, informed him that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Remain steadfast, although you will not fully be able to do so. Know that the best of your deeds is prayer, and only a believer maintains his wudu consistently.'
7.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Kabsha al-Saluli bahwa Tsauban, pelayan Rasulullah ﷺ, memberitahunya bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Istiqamahlah, meskipun kalian tidak akan sepenuhnya mampu melakukannya. Ketahuilah bahwa sebaik-baik amal kalian adalah shalat, dan hanya seorang mukmin yang selalu menjaga wudhunya.'

8.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ikrimah that Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) used to pray the five daily prayers two by two — combining Dhuhr with Asr, and Maghrib with Isha when he was in his city. When he was asked about this, he said that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to do so.
8.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ikrimah bahwa Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) terbiasa shalat lima waktu dua-dua — menggabungkan Zuhur dengan Ashar, dan Maghrib dengan Isya ketika berada di kotanya. Ketika ditanya tentang hal ini, dia berkata bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa melakukan demikian.

9.iwh_en: It was narrated that Abdullah ibn Abdullah ibn Umar said: 'I asked my father — meaning Ibn Umar — whether I should pray with a man who has combined the two prayers. He said: I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ combine prayers when he needed to, so pray with him.'
9.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Abdullah ibn Abdullah ibn Umar berkata: 'Aku bertanya kepada ayahku — yaitu Ibn Umar — apakah aku boleh shalat bersama seorang pria yang menggabungkan dua shalat. Dia berkata: Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ menggabungkan shalat ketika diperlukan, maka shalatiah bersamanya.'

10.iwh_en: It was narrated from Buraydah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to make a new ablution for every prayer. On the Day of the Conquest of Mecca, he performed all the prayers with one ablution and wiped over his leather socks. Umar said to him: 'O Messenger of Allah, you have done something today that you have not done before.' He said: 'I did it deliberately, O Umar.'
10.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Buraidah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berwudhu baru untuk setiap shalat. Pada Hari Penaklukan Mekah, beliau mengerjakan semua shalat dengan satu wudhu dan mengusap kedua khuf-nya. Umar berkata kepadanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, engkau telah melakukan sesuatu hari ini yang belum pernah engkau lakukan sebelumnya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku melakukannya dengan sengaja, wahai Umar.'

11.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform ablution for every prayer and we used to pray all of our prayers with a single ablution.
11.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berwudhu untuk setiap shalat, sedangkan kami biasa mengerjakan semua shalat kami dengan satu wudhu.

12.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Were it not that I would be overburdening my community, I would have commanded them to perform ablution for every prayer and to use the siwak with every ablution.'
12.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seandainya tidak memberatkan umatku, niscaya aku memerintahkan mereka berwudhu untuk setiap shalat dan bersiwak bersama setiap wudhu.'

13.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Were it not that I would be overburdening my community — or the people — I would have commanded them to use the siwak with every prayer.'
13.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seandainya tidak memberatkan umatku — atau orang-orang — niscaya aku memerintahkan mereka bersiwak bersama setiap shalat.'

14.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Were it not that I would be overburdening the believers, I would have commanded them to delay the Isha prayer and to use the siwak with every prayer.'
14.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seandainya tidak memberatkan orang-orang beriman, niscaya aku memerintahkan mereka untuk mengakhirkan shalat Isya dan bersiwak bersama setiap shalat.'

15.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The siwak is a purification for the mouth and pleasing to the Lord.'
15.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Siwak adalah pembersih mulut dan diridhai Rabb.'

16.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Umamah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Use the siwak, for the siwak is a purification for the mouth and pleasing to the Lord. Whenever Jibril came to me he always enjoined the siwak upon me, so much that I feared it would be made obligatory upon me and my community. Were it not that I would be overburdening my community, I would have made it obligatory upon them. I use the siwak so much that I have feared it would wear away the front of my mouth.'
16.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Umamah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Gunakanlah siwak, karena siwak adalah pembersih mulut dan diridhai Rabb. Setiap kali Jibril datang kepadaku, dia selalu memerintahkanku bersiwak, sehingga aku khawatir hal itu akan diwajibkan atasku dan umatku. Seandainya tidak memberatkan umatku, niscaya aku wajibkan bagi mereka. Aku begitu sering bersiwak sehingga aku khawatir bagian depan mulutku akan terkikis.'

17.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfah ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that whenever the Messenger of Allah ﷺ got up at night to pray, he would brush his teeth with the siwak.
17.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa setiap kali Rasulullah ﷺ bangun di malam hari untuk shalat, beliau selalu menggosok giginya dengan siwak.

18.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Ten actions are from the natural disposition (fitrah): trimming the mustache, letting the beard grow, using the siwak, rinsing the nose, clipping the nails, washing the knuckles, plucking the armpit hair, shaving the pubic hair, and conserving water.' The narrator said: I forgot the tenth, but it may be rinsing the mouth.
18.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sepuluh hal termasuk fitrah: memangkas kumis, membiarkan jenggot tumbuh, bersiwak, menghirup air ke hidung, memotong kuku, mencuci ruas jari, mencabut bulu ketiak, mencukur bulu kemaluan, dan berhemat air.' Perawi berkata: Aku lupa yang kesepuluh, tapi mungkin berkumur.

19.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Three things are from the noble character: using the siwak, wearing perfume, and fasting.'
19.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tiga hal termasuk akhlak mulia: bersiwak, memakai wewangian, dan berpuasa.'

20.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Four things are from the practice of the Messengers: modesty, using perfume, using the siwak, and marriage.'
20.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Empat hal termasuk sunnah para rasul: rasa malu, memakai wewangian, bersiwak, dan menikah.'

21.iwh_en: It was narrated from Wathilah ibn al-Asqa' (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I was commanded to use the siwak until I feared it would be revealed to me in the Quran.'
21.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Watsilah ibn al-Asqa' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku diperintahkan untuk bersiwak hingga aku khawatir hal itu akan diturunkan kepadaku dalam Al-Quran.'

22.iwh_en: It was narrated that Abd al-Rahman ibn Ghanam al-Ash'ari said: I asked Mu'adh ibn Jabal: 'What would you say if I use the siwak from after the Fajr prayer until the sun rises and the prayer time comes, then I perform ablution?' He said: 'I see nothing wrong with that. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The siwak is a purification for the mouth and pleasing to the Lord."'
22.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Abdurrahman ibn Ghanam al-Asy'ari berkata: Aku bertanya kepada Mu'adz ibn Jabal: 'Bagaimana menurutmu jika aku bersiwak sejak setelah shalat Subuh hingga matahari terbit dan waktu shalat masuk, lalu aku berwudhu?' Dia berkata: 'Aku tidak melihat masalah dengan itu. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Siwak adalah pembersih mulut dan diridhai Rabb."'

23.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I have emphasized the siwak to you so much that I feared it would be made obligatory upon you.'
23.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku telah sangat menekankan siwak kepada kalian sehingga aku khawatir hal itu akan diwajibkan atas kalian.'

24.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'No one performs ablution and completes his ablution properly, then prays two rak'ahs giving them their full due, except that Paradise becomes obligatory for him.'
24.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidaklah seseorang berwudhu dan menyempurnakan wudhunya, kemudian shalat dua rakaat dengan memberikan hak keduanya, melainkan surga menjadi wajib baginya.'

25.iwh_en: It was narrated from Uqbah ibn Amir al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'No Muslim performs ablution and performs it well, then stands and prays two rak'ahs, turning his heart and face to Allah, except that Paradise becomes obligatory for him.'
25.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Uqbah ibn Amir al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidaklah seorang Muslim berwudhu dan memperbagus wudhunya, lalu berdiri dan shalat dua rakaat dengan menghadapkan hati dan wajahnya kepada Allah, melainkan surga menjadi wajib baginya.'

26.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever performs ablution and performs it well, then says: "I bear witness that there is no god but Allah alone, with no partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and messenger" — all eight gates of Paradise are opened for him and he may enter through whichever he wishes.'
26.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berwudhu dan memperbagus wudhunya, kemudian mengucapkan: "Aku bersaksi bahwa tidak ada tuhan selain Allah semata, tiada sekutu bagi-Nya, dan aku bersaksi bahwa Muhammad adalah hamba dan utusan-Nya" — kedelapan pintu surga dibuka untuknya dan dia boleh masuk melalui mana saja yang dia kehendaki.'

27.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'There is no ablution for one who does not mention the name of Allah upon it.'
27.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada wudhu bagi orang yang tidak menyebut nama Allah atasnya.'

28.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'There is no prayer for one who has no ablution, and there is no ablution for one who does not mention the name of Allah over it.'
28.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada shalat bagi orang yang tidak berwudhu, dan tidak ada wudhu bagi orang yang tidak menyebut nama Allah atasnya.'

29.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'id ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'There is no ablution for one who does not mention the name of Allah over it.'
29.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'id ibn Zaid (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada wudhu bagi orang yang tidak menyebut nama Allah atasnya.'

30.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Woe to the heels on the Day of Resurrection from the Fire!' He said this three times.
30.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Celaka bagi tumit-tumit pada Hari Kiamat dari api neraka!' Beliau mengucapkan ini tiga kali.

31.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Woe to the heels from the Fire!'
31.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Celaka bagi tumit-tumit dari api neraka!'

32.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Woe to the heels from the Fire!' We used to see him ﷺ wash his foot and move his fingers between the toes.
32.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Celaka bagi tumit-tumit dari api neraka!' Kami biasa melihat beliau ﷺ membasuh kakinya dan menyela-nyela jari-jari kakinya.

33.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khallad ibn al-Saaib al-Ansari, from his father (may Allah be pleased with him), that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Gabriel came to me and commanded me to raise my voice with the talbiyah, for it is among the symbols of Hajj.'
33.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khallad ibn al-Saib al-Anshari, dari ayahnya (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jibril datang kepadaku dan memerintahkanku untuk mengeraskan suara dengan talbiyah, karena itu termasuk syiar-syiar haji.'

34.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When you perform ablution, begin with your right side.' And in another narration: 'Begin with your right limbs when performing ablution.'
34.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila kalian berwudhu, mulailah dengan sisi kananmu.' Dan dalam riwayat lain: 'Mulailah dengan anggota tubuh kananmu saat berwudhu.'

35.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved to start from the right in his purification when he purified himself, in his combing when he combed his hair, and in putting on his sandals.
35.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyukai memulai dari sisi kanan dalam bersucinya ketika bersuci, dalam menyisir rambutnya ketika menyisir, dan dalam memakai sandalnya.

36.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him and his family) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed ablution, washing each part three times. Then he said: 'Whoever adds more than this or does less has done wrong and been unjust.'
36.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Thalib (radhiyallahu 'anhu wa aalihi) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berwudhu, membasuh setiap bagian tiga kali. Kemudian beliau bersabda: 'Barangsiapa menambah lebih dari ini atau mengurangi, maka dia telah berbuat salah dan zalim.'

37.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Amr ibn al-As (may Allah be pleased with him) that a Bedouin asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about ablution. He ﷺ showed him how to perform it three times for each part, then said: 'This is the ablution. Whoever does more than this has done wrong, exceeded the limit, or done injustice.'
37.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Amr ibn al-'Ash (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang Badui bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang wudhu. Beliau ﷺ mencontohkannya dengan membasuh setiap bagian tiga kali, kemudian bersabda: 'Inilah wudhu. Barangsiapa menambah lebih dari ini, maka dia telah berbuat salah, melampaui batas, atau berbuat aniaya.'

38.iwh_en: It was narrated from Amr ibn Shu'ayb, from his father, from his grandfather (may Allah be pleased with him) that a Bedouin came to the Prophet ﷺ asking about ablution. The Prophet ﷺ showed him how to perform ablution three times and said: 'This is the ablution. Whoever adds to it has done wrong.'
38.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Amr ibn Syu'aib, dari ayahnya, dari kakeknya (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang Badui datang kepada Nabi ﷺ bertanya tentang wudhu. Nabi ﷺ menunjukkan cara berwudhu tiga kali dan bersabda: 'Inilah wudhu. Barangsiapa menambah lebih dari ini, maka dia telah berbuat salah.'

39.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came to the graveyard and said: 'Peace be upon you, O abode of a believing people. We will, if Allah wills, join you. I wish I had seen our brothers.' They said: 'Are we not your brothers, O Messenger of Allah?' He said: 'You are my companions. Our brothers are those who have not yet come.' They said: 'How will you recognize those of your community who have not yet come, O Messenger of Allah?' He said: 'Do you not see that if a man had horses with white blazes on their faces and feet among dark horses, would he not recognize his horses?' They said: 'Of course, O Messenger of Allah.' He said: 'They will come on the Day of Resurrection with their ablution marks shining, and I will precede them to the Hawd. Some men will be driven away from my Hawd as a stray camel is driven away, and I will call out: "Come, come!" Then it will be said: "These people changed things after you." So I will say: "Away, away!"'
39.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ pergi ke pemakaman dan bersabda: 'Salam atas kalian, wahai tempat tinggal kaum beriman. Kami akan, insya Allah, menyusul kalian. Betapa aku ingin melihat saudara-saudara kami.' Para sahabat bertanya: 'Bukankah kami saudara-saudaramu, wahai Rasulullah?' Beliau bersabda: 'Kalian adalah sahabat-sahabatku. Saudara-saudara kami adalah mereka yang belum datang.' Mereka bertanya: 'Bagaimana engkau akan mengenali mereka?' Beliau bersabda: 'Mereka akan datang pada Hari Kiamat dengan bekas-bekas wudhu yang bersinar, dan aku akan mendahului mereka menuju al-Haudh.'

40.iwh_en: It was narrated from Amr ibn Yahya al-Mazini, from his father, that Uthman ibn Affan (may Allah be pleased with him) asked for a vessel of water, then poured it over his hands three times and washed them. Then he put his right hand into the vessel and rinsed his mouth and nose. Then he washed his face three times and his hands up to the elbows three times. Then he wiped his head. Then he washed his right foot three times, then his left foot three times. Then he said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ perform ablution as I have just done.' Then he said: 'Whoever performs ablution as I have just done, then prays two rak'ahs without his mind wandering, Allah will forgive his previous sins.'
40.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Amr ibn Yahya al-Mazini, dari ayahnya, bahwa Utsman ibn Affan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meminta bejana berisi air, lalu menuangkannya ke atas kedua tangannya tiga kali dan mencucinya. Kemudian dia memasukkan tangan kanannya ke dalam bejana dan berkumur serta menghirup air ke hidung. Kemudian dia mencuci wajahnya tiga kali dan tangannya hingga siku tiga kali. Kemudian dia mengusap kepalanya. Kemudian mencuci kaki kanannya tiga kali, lalu kaki kirinya tiga kali. Kemudian berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ berwudhu sebagaimana yang baru aku lakukan.' Lalu berkata: 'Barangsiapa berwudhu seperti yang baru aku lakukan, kemudian shalat dua rakaat tanpa pikirannya berkeliaran, Allah akan mengampuni dosa-dosanya yang terdahulu.'

41.iwh_en: It was narrated from Humran, the freed servant of Uthman ibn Affan, that Uthman ibn Affan (may Allah be pleased with him) called for water for ablution. He washed his hands three times, then rinsed his mouth and nose, then washed his face three times, then washed his right hand up to the elbow three times, then his left hand likewise, then wiped his head, then washed his right foot three times and his left foot three times. He then said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ perform ablution as I have just performed it.' Then he recited this hadith about two rak'ahs and forgiveness of sins.
41.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Humran, bekas budak Utsman ibn Affan, bahwa Utsman ibn Affan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meminta air untuk berwudhu. Dia mencuci tangannya tiga kali, berkumur dan menghirup air ke hidung, mencuci wajahnya tiga kali, mencuci tangan kanannya hingga siku tiga kali, kemudian tangan kirinya demikian pula, mengusap kepalanya, mencuci kaki kanannya tiga kali dan kaki kirinya tiga kali. Kemudian berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ berwudhu sebagaimana yang baru aku lakukan.'

42.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abd Khayr that Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him and his family) performed ablution in the courtyard of the mosque. He called for a vessel and washed his hands from it three times before putting them in the vessel. Then he rinsed his mouth and nose three times. Then he washed his face three times and washed his hands — meaning up to the elbows — three times each. Then he wiped his head once. Then he washed his feet three times each. He then said: 'I wanted to show you the ablution of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
42.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abd Khayr bahwa Ali ibn Abi Thalib (radhiyallahu 'anhu wa aalihi) berwudhu di halaman masjid. Dia meminta bejana dan mencuci tangannya tiga kali sebelum memasukkannya ke dalam bejana. Kemudian berkumur dan menghirup air ke hidung tiga kali. Kemudian mencuci wajahnya tiga kali dan tangannya — yaitu hingga siku — tiga kali. Kemudian mengusap kepalanya sekali. Kemudian mencuci kedua kakinya tiga kali. Dia berkata: 'Aku ingin menunjukkan kepada kalian cara wudhu Rasulullah ﷺ.'

43.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abd Khayr al-Hamdani that Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him and his family) called for a vessel and poured water from it over his right hand three times before putting it into the vessel, then wiped his beard with a handful of water, then wiped his head with his wet hand once — going from front to back and then back to front — and washed his feet up to the ankles. He then said that this is how the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed ablution.
43.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abd Khayr al-Hamdani bahwa Ali ibn Abi Thalib (radhiyallahu 'anhu wa aalihi) meminta bejana dan menuangkan air darinya ke atas tangan kanannya tiga kali sebelum memasukkannya ke dalam bejana, kemudian mengusap janggutnya dengan segenggam air, kemudian mengusap kepalanya dengan tangannya yang basah sekali — dari depan ke belakang kemudian dari belakang ke depan — dan mencuci kedua kakinya hingga mata kaki. Dia kemudian berkata bahwa demikianlah Rasulullah ﷺ berwudhu.

44.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abd Khayr, from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him and his family), that he said: 'I will show you the ablution of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.' He then performed ablution washing each limb once, then said: 'This is the ablution of one who does not accept prayers except with it.'
44.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abd Khayr, dari Ali ibn Abi Thalib (radhiyallahu 'anhu wa aalihi), bahwa dia berkata: 'Aku akan menunjukkan kepada kalian wudhu Rasulullah ﷺ.' Dia kemudian berwudhu membasuh setiap anggota tubuh sekali, kemudian berkata: 'Inilah wudhu orang yang tidak diterima shalatnya kecuali dengannya.'

45.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abd Khayr, from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him and his family), that he washed his face three times, washed his arms three times each, and wiped his head once. He said: 'I have shown you how the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed his purification.'
45.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abd Khayr, dari Ali ibn Abi Thalib (radhiyallahu 'anhu wa aalihi), bahwa dia mencuci wajahnya tiga kali, mencuci kedua lengannya tiga kali, dan mengusap kepalanya sekali. Dia berkata: 'Aku telah menunjukkan kepada kalian cara Rasulullah ﷺ bersuci.'

46.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Gabriel showed me the ablution and taught me the prayer: he washed his face, then his arms up to the elbows, then wiped his head, then washed his feet — doing each once.' He performed it a second time and said: 'This is the ablution; whoever adds to it or reduces it has done wrong.' He performed it a third time and said: 'This is the ablution of the Prophets.'
46.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jibril menunjukkan kepadaku wudhu dan mengajariku shalat: dia mencuci wajahnya, kemudian tangannya hingga siku, kemudian mengusap kepalanya, kemudian mencuci kakinya — melakukan masing-masing sekali.' Dia melakukannya kedua kali dan berkata: 'Inilah wudhu; barangsiapa menambah atau mengurangi, maka dia telah berbuat salah.' Dia melakukannya ketiga kali dan berkata: 'Inilah wudhu para nabi.'

47.iwh_en: It was narrated from Muawiyah ibn Abi Sufyan (may Allah be pleased with him) that he performed ablution, washing each limb once, then said: 'This is the ablution of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.' Then he washed each limb twice and said: 'This is the ablution of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.' Then he washed each limb three times and said: 'This is the ablution of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
47.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Muawiyah ibn Abi Sufyan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berwudhu, membasuh setiap anggota sekali, lalu berkata: 'Inilah wudhu Rasulullah ﷺ.' Kemudian membasuh setiap anggota dua kali dan berkata: 'Inilah wudhu Rasulullah ﷺ.' Kemudian membasuh setiap anggota tiga kali dan berkata: 'Inilah wudhu Rasulullah ﷺ.'

48.iwh_en: It was narrated from Talhah ibn Mus'arrif, from his father, from his grandfather (may Allah be pleased with him) that he saw the Prophet ﷺ performing ablution, wiping his head — going from front to back — once.
48.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Thalhah ibn Mus'arrif, dari ayahnya, dari kakeknya (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia melihat Nabi ﷺ berwudhu, mengusap kepalanya — dari depan ke belakang — sekali.

49.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Zayd ibn Asim al-Mazini (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed ablution. He first rinsed his mouth and nose, then washed his face three times and his hands up to the elbows three times. Then he wiped his head from front to back and then back to front. Then he washed his feet.
49.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Zaid ibn Ashim al-Mazini (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berwudhu. Pertama beliau berkumur dan menghirup air ke hidung, kemudian mencuci wajahnya tiga kali dan tangannya hingga siku tiga kali. Kemudian mengusap kepalanya dari depan ke belakang kemudian dari belakang ke depan. Kemudian mencuci kedua kakinya.

50.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed ablution. He poured water from a vessel on his hands and washed them, then put his right hand into the vessel and rinsed his mouth and nose together three times with three scoops. Then he washed his face three times and his arms three times each. Then he inserted both hands and wiped his head — going forward with both hands and then back — once. Then he washed his feet.
50.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Zaid (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berwudhu. Beliau menuangkan air dari bejana ke atas tangannya dan mencucinya, kemudian memasukkan tangan kanannya ke dalam bejana dan berkumur serta menghirup air ke hidung bersama-sama tiga kali dengan tiga cidukan. Kemudian mencuci wajahnya tiga kali dan lengannya tiga kali. Kemudian memasukkan kedua tangan dan mengusap kepalanya — maju dengan kedua tangan kemudian mundur — sekali. Kemudian mencuci kedua kakinya.
